description: A vertical, designed Department of Labor slogan graphic combining a photo and big-type statistic. The top half is a color photograph of President Trump speaking into a microphone, shown from the chest up against a dark blue, softly bokeh-lit background; he wears a dark suit and light blue tie. The bottom half is a dark navy field carrying a very large white serif '100%' followed by an italic white serif line 'of job gains have gone to' and, in a bold white sans-serif on a blue highlight bar, 'NATIVE-BORN WORKERS.' A small white DOL/eagle emblem is centered at the very bottom. The design uses an oversized headline statistic and the slogan-style 'NATIVE-BORN WORKERS' phrasing to push an 'America First' / nativist labor message claiming all job gains went to native-born workers. Target audience: nationalist, pro-worker supporters, framing the administration's economic record as benefiting American-born citizens over immigrants.
notable_text: 100% of job gains have gone to NATIVE-BORN WORKERS (tweet adds: AMERICANS FIRST)
